name: Automations
description: Schedule recurring AI-powered tasks with file-based automation definitions
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: Scheduled interval automations now fire on time.
1.0.1: Reliable automation status detection on Windows and consistent skill namespacing.
marketplace.tagline: Run recurring AI workflows from markdown automation definitions
marketplace.longDescription: Define recurring automations in markdown and let Nimbalyst run them on a schedule. Use them for routine reviews, status updates, content refreshes, and any repeatable AI workflow that should happen without starting a new session manually.
highlights: Markdown-based automation definitions stored in your workspace
Recurring AI workflows for routine checks and updates
Built-in tools to list, create, and run automations
Fits alongside plans, docs, and the rest of your project files
